name: Steve Chabot
subject: The Georgia Runoff
body:
Georgia on My Mind No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-juhrijiy-kujkulhluu-s/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juhrijiy-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juhrijiy-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [The Georgia Runoff](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juhrijiy-kujkulhluu-j/)
The upcoming Georgia Senate runoffs are perhaps the most important races in recent memory. They will decide what kind of country we are for years to come. I talk about why that is in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juhrijiy-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juhrijiy-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Let's Not Repeat Obama's Mistake in Iraq](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juhrijiy-kujkulhluu-d/)
A further reduction of US troops in Iraq was recently announced. Is this a wise move? I think not, and here's why. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juhrijiy-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juhrijiy-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Slaughter in Nigeria](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juhrijiy-kujkulhluu-u/)
It's happened again. The Islamist terror group Boko Haram has once again attacked innocent civilians in Nigeria. With the current COVID surge, the aftermath of the recent election and the upcoming holiday season, odds are you didn't see mention of this latest atrocity in most news coverage. In this week's blog, I discuss why this recent attack, or any terrorist threat, must not be ignored. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juhrijiy-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juhrijiy-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Losing Afghanistan?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juhrijiy-kujkulhluu-n/)
It was announced recently that US troop levels in Afghanistan will soon be reduced from 4500 to 2500. I am concerned that this is a mistake and in this week's blog I explain why. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juhrijiy-kujkulhluu-p/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juhrijiy-kujkulhluu-x/)
### [Suck It Up?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juhrijiy-kujkulhluu-m/)
Whoopi thinks conservatives like you and me just need to "suck it up." Here's what I think about that. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juhrijiy-kujkulhluu-c/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juhrijiy-kujkulhluu-q/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juhrijiy-kujkulhluu-a/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juhrijiy-kujkulhluu-f/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juhrijiy-kujkulhluu-z/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juhrijiy-kujkulhluu-v/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juhrijiy-kujkulhluu-e/)
---|---|---
Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254

body:
Help Us Flip Georgia Blue | | | |

“Mitch McConnell has a vested interest in not only burning the house down, but blocking the firefighters from coming to save us,” says Stacey Abrams. “And unfortunately, Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue are happy standing next to him holding the matches.”
| | |
---
| Friend,

There are just 20 days left before the runoff elections in Georgia. Together, we have to do all that we can to make sure that these candidates have the resources they need to get across the finish line on January, 5th.

**Why? **

Flipping Georgia blue and electing Jon Ossoff and Raphael Warnock will make it possible to help working families who are struggling in the middle of this pandemic by passing common sense relief bills that will get money in the pockets of hard working Americans.

Many American families will worry about the safety and well being of their families during the holidays this year because of our Government's inaction to pass desperately needed legislation to extend unemployment benefits, paid sick leave and paid family leave.

**With paidleave set to expire on December 31, 87 million workers will have to choose between a paycheck and their health. **

American families deserve a Senate that puts workers before corporations and people before profits.

I am coming to you for help because my life as a single mom and all of our lives as Americans will be greatly impacted by the outcome of the Georgia runoff elections on January, 5th.

**Will you[chip in](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=3fbd4b9072&e=3f151f8b74) and help us win this fight? We can do this, but we can't do this without you. **

Sincerely,

Simona Grace

Founder, Moms in Office

| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE THURSDAY, DECEMBER 17, 2020 LOEFFLER ON FOX NEWS: IF WE DON'T VOTE, WE COULD SEE AMERICA'S FIRST MARXIST U.S. SENATOR
ATLANTA - In case you missed it, conservative businesswoman and political outsider Kelly Loeffler joined Sean Hannity last night to discuss the latest in her Senate runoff race and urge Georgians to vote early. As Senator Loeffler said, "If we don't vote, we could see the election of America's first Marxist [U.S.] Senator." Click [HERE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001p7R_DeSpeZqYPIyOa2h-_5EFvX1s5tWFpboitHZBy9EdD2FBQa_r_pXPcOzt_fKkc3tqAc4KAxkd7fE8JOHQRajrJVtUvdzGV-SDLa5psT-0VoCBK5RmirkeRAncwlY46BuhuO_X5PnqhXpPhGBCLZ_5ooWvbFOECMBQxJ_DNDu0QWEjwI2vPQ==&c=wfv_XdYaaJBFePIx1LYSfnOk7wtnn3b2Uh0TJyG7o248nNqheViqeA==&ch=E79ZpD0JFXl5FOs-Tknxdk3-jAKZw8teJHJIWl6hB0WTpKAvFuA0TA==) or on the photo below to watch the full interview:

name: Mitch McConnell
subject: How are we STILL behind?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCCONNELL SENATE COMMITTEE
body:
After I found out that we MISSED our mid-month fundraising deadline, I EXTENDED the 5X MATCHING offer for all conservative grassroots contributions. But I just spoke with my team, and they said that we are STILL behind our original goal. If we don't meet this goal by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT, that's it for us. We won't be able to catch up in Georgia and Democrats will TAKE OVER the Senate.

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Today, I'm emailing you, Friend, to ask for your endorsement, but I hope you'll give me a chance to explain why it's so important.

I'm an immigrant and proud conservative woman fighting for lower taxes, fewer regulations, affordable healthcare, and a pro-business environment. I've fought to solve issues of homelessness and affordability -- _the issues we face everyday here in California. _

As one of the first Korean American women elected to Congress, I couldn't be prouder to represent California's 39th district. But this fight is far from over and your support is more important than ever.

We are facing one of the toughest races in the nation. The Democrats' spent $20+ million to defeat us and with Pelosi's majority hanging by a thread, we remain a top target. They're going to spend millions more attacking us in their desperate attempts to defeat us.

But they clearly don't understand the strength of our grassroots campaign. [**Can I count on your endorsement? We need to prove to the Democrats we have the widespread support to WIN.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001s6ILC6Djx3Qn-sJxqbkXRotxAbJmYlsnXQeqyVWOMTrEWGJs-TRfxAnrJjtWmdM_P7cXLIKlYX7qHGRGkphzhJJMgsREt7MFZjl_ameMukF11z-XSwlS1euOBrND9WVeo9VvW-a3816Q1UukxVKJPmuIcAgQFQGNzdSPbXMnRmN9rVAxtwQKAVYrRYr5Hs60r9nQp-LO1aICe4ScERUcP4OFO0neSH5K9GEqWxtVUPZULx6Y06X-t1154yrPtqkdy5AD8WEAheP48MokiKIy1nkpUj6022jPZmHIMbeGIOWYzTAMGQCqR0oZyB3bECQB6lLV68VQVCDRjFLrikUkM8Xzekc0lpJr7JzVAZdKXMCbXJkcgvBOuUYNKIkQl8ssBittjiaVs5Q=&c=z4D86vqHZMmyTQTPGsh2F42YWeIz0lkpNqgOaBpAtoq1ZsWL9S3VOQ==&ch=yk8BhkyYpUnbHBoLg69zRli6qBSe_nQ7Yax8xWioTgVEKXynZNIabQ==)

name: Team NHGOP
subject: Here they go again....
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
Democrats are pushing their agenda.

Derek, **Democrats are at it again.** They've started filing legislation for the upcoming legislative term, and their bills are a blast from the past. They're still pursuing the same out-of-touch agenda that Granite State voters rejected on November 3rd, and we need to show them that we're paying attention. Here are just some of their bad pieces of proposed legislation: **Increased Regulations:**
* 2021-0001 relative to the state minimum hourly rate.
* 2021-0293 relative to the licensure and regulation of music therapists.
* 2021-0741 prohibiting the use of polystyrene foam.

**Gun Restrictions:**
* 2021-0143 establishing a protective order for vulnerable adults.
* 2021-0252 requiring background checks for commercial firearms sales.

**Weakening Voter Laws:**
* 2021-0745 relative to domicile, residency, voter registration, and investigation of voter verification letters, and relative to the terms “resident,” “inhabitant,” “residence,” and “residency.”
* 2021-0249 allowing voters to vote by absentee ballot

Rumor has it that New Hampshire Democrats are even going to resurrect their _**disastrous Income Tax legislation.**_ Are you going to help us hold these Democrats accountable? [Your donation today will help us support our Republican legislators who are fighting back against the Democrats' terrible pieces of legislation.](http://email.robly.com/ls/click?upn=uaUlc6wqPXNLu3PjY1l0S544eZr5fpr9Q1ABA8pyltkzrJrXv1caUmjCKQyNcpMiJUluRd2KZ3NJxPE2eg720LsArgS1jCDwb9qTxZkzl5i9XIiTIZFf3lo3duB4wz0p4Wo-_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymgzzRhEeBCxzfLf2ZzOEJ6KG70kf-2B7fgkQ-2Brpwwq1Oa077cbGbXketR9057WP932xujUN8MKBeL-2BCufrP3y7UDmdkAnvHYKWwZOaIiQsrkq4FaCNxKcfRJV-2B5q4pdTvBrGXi3w1BTzaE4Kj3u7CNQ-2FqOi7oo-2FdftqEnu1zTAerGl875JnAS9gwqWcP67PWvw1wcZD-2BBdVSM58t671MO5CZVZSZVSEpvQ4pdGxTOKO6NWp-2FGO9blxA9NTe5nKR01yKLhaS62r4uwjmXQHJdA0dUXCzoLNfSp-2FINRgJt-2Fqf-2BIzVvRntyWC114J-2BZX12QuViMWrP-2F9o5wjhm5tLLRQ90f1hGjbM4LweAiohEbaJRhFhzT9a7F5j-2FGakq1RjVTKzbhK9-2F1jDVpFPuZa3ZVk1TsDUuMhOn3V7dF9x2UV3jiBkA-3D-3D) With our new majorities we need to continue to hold the line against this disastrous legislation - [your support will help our new Republican majorities defend New Hampshire.](http://email.robly.com/ls/click?upn=uaUlc6wqPXNLu3PjY1l0S544eZr5fpr9Q1ABA8pyltkzrJrXv1caUmjCKQyNcpMiJUluRd2KZ3NJxPE2eg720LsArgS1jCDwb9qTxZkzl5i9XIiTIZFf3lo3duB4wz0puP5M_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymgzzRhEeBCxzfLf2ZzOEJ6KG70kf-2B7fgkQ-2Brpwwq1Oa077cbGbXketR9057WP932xujUN8MKBeL-2BCufrP3y7UDmdkAnvHYKWwZOaIiQsrkq4FaCNxKcfRJV-2B5q4pdTvBrGXi3w1BTzaE4Kj3u7CNQ-2FqOi7oo-2FdftqEnu1zTAerGl875JnAS9gwqWcP67PWvw1wcZD-2BBdVSM58t671MO5CZVZSZVSEpvQ4pdGxTOKO6NWvIHox8qKIPxxaeNXhGhWpwx6d0kVa-2BA9l3nW-2B58e4rWuAKdElt9EqKsgdyD-2FodIBXYEMMV9RmeMOuzfCzdPZS1163T6gPHpDO8pficKDtjrs3L7gtRPkVCgXa-2BAy42eRFUcQ3uwinMb0X7FTEluZNqcW3NyGK6pPQG2qD4UDeXS3Ufg-2F6CGNht2j6rtxlDNeg-3D-3D) \- Team NHGOP [Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee.

body:
If we let the Democrats gain control of the Senate, everything President Trump and his Senate allies fought to accomplish will be DESTROYED.
Friend,

I've seen several alarming reports and even received one from NRSC Headquarters about Democrats using underhanded tactics to influence Georgia's Senate runoff elections:

-**FOX NEWS** : Californians preparing to descend on Georgia to fight for Democrats in Senate races
-**WAPO** : Out-of-state Democrats pretending to be from Georgia to call potential voters
-**From NRSC HQ** : Obama, Bernie, AOC, Stacey Abrams, and others are fundraising for their hand-picked radical left candidates, raising MILLIONS for their campaigns

name: Lt. Col. Allen West (Ret.), My Faith Votes
subject: The Countdown Begins
body:
Peter,
There has been a lot of talk about boycotting the upcoming runoff elections on January 5th that will determine control of the U.S. Senate.
There are even progressive political organizations and conservative political figures urging people not to vote.
**Christian voters have way too much on the line to sit this out.**
That is why in addition to our digital efforts, My Faith Votes volunteers are in the midst of sending one million handwritten postcards to targeted voters to ensure they get to the polls. It will be a tangible, personal reminder about why this election matters.
However, because the volunteer commitment has been so unprecedented, we still do not have the resources we need to print all the postcards and cover all the postage. We made major progress on Giving Tuesday but we are still short.
**So, before our[ hard-stop](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201217apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201217apl01nd&n=1) mailing date of December 29, we must raise another $200,000. It is a big goal, and because it is so important, a generous donor has offered to match every gift up to $100,000. Your gift before the end of the year will trigger the match and double your support.******
[**Our volunteers are waiting and ready. Will you chip in with a tax-deductible gift now? We only have a couple weeks to go and we could really use your help today.**](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201217apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201217apl01nd&n=2)
Thank you for your ongoing support.
[](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201217apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201217apl01nd&n=3)
Steadfast and Loyal,
Lt. Col. Allen West (Ret.)
National Spokesperson
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201217apl01nd&n=4)
©2020 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker Rd, #640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201217apl01nd&n=5).

name: Kevin Hern
subject: Our allies in Georgia desperately need your help!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
Our last chance to save America from the destructive policies of the left is in Georgia. Read more >>
Dear Peter, By now I’m sure you’ve heard about what’s going on in Georgia. Both of their U.S. Senate seats are headed to runoffs on January 5th, and if we lose them, we lose our Senate majority! It is CRITICAL that we send help to Republicans Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue. That’s why I’m helping their campaigns — so every donation will have the biggest impact possible. **Please chip in what you can now to help Kelly and David win these races!** [**CHIP IN FOR GEORGIA NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/9c6c907a13d4cc0c/0805324bbd3c38c4c3d6b838967d376c/34143) The Senate may very well be our LAST LINE OF DEFENSE against radical leftist policies that will destroy our way of life here in Oklahoma and the whole of America. They’ve already admitted to wanting to enact the job-killing Green New Deal, ending the electoral college, opening the borders, and much, much more. Who knows what else they are capable of if they have total control in Washington?
**Our Georgia allies are in dire straits right now. They are both down by several points in the latest polls, and we need to act fast to send them crucial funds to get every single registered Republican to the ballot box to vote.** I hope I can count on you to help me save Georgia and save our American way of life. Thanks for chipping in,
Kevin Hern [**CHIP IN $5 TO SAVE THE SENATE >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/9c6c907a13d4cc0c/6cf6facb66344aa7c3d6b838967d376c/34143) [**CHIP IN $10 TO SAVE THE SENATE >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/9c6c907a13d4cc0c/f3a0eb1aa6e620ccc3d6b838967d376c/34143) [**CHIP IN $50 TO SAVE THE SENATE >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/9c6c907a13d4cc0c/afeada2fefbbce87c3d6b838967d376c/34143) [**CHIP IN $100 TO SAVE THE SENATE >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/9c6c907a13d4cc0c/695a0484cf77234ac3d6b838967d376c/34143) [**CHIP IN $250 TO SAVE THE SENATE >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/9c6c907a13d4cc0c/9a55223d1fdb252fc3d6b838967d376c/34143) [**CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT TO SAVE THE SENATE >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/9c6c907a13d4cc0c/93c4d8ffd79a3270c3d6b838967d376c/34143) id:2020-12-15-16:42:43:093t Paid For By Hern For Congress

As a proven leader in the U.S. Senate, we need David to win to help combat the encroachment of the left. == Hi friend, I reached out to you a few weeks ago about the critical Senate races in Georgia, and now I'm following up because this January 5th is so important to our nation's future. Senator David Perdue's seat is at risk in one of the two Senate runoffs. As a proven leader in the U.S. Senate, we need David to win to help combat the encroachment of the left. We must do everything we can to protect this seat. Simply put, the fate of the Senate and our nation rests on this Jan. 5 runoff, and David is counting on us to help him protect this key seat and the GOP majority. == == Senator Perdue has been a champion for our conservative values, and keeping his seat red is vital to the future of our party. Sen. Perdue knows the importance of getting our economy back on track, strengthening education, and ensuring our veterans and service members are supported in Congress. == == == Democrats have made winning back this seat a top priority, and they are sparing no expense to ensure they have control of the Senate, House of Representatives, and the White House. Friend, that's why we must combat the efforts of the far left if we have any shot at saving David's key seat and keeping the Senate majority in Republican hands. == Friend, you made the difference in my campaign and helped flip the only Democrat-held seat in Oklahoma. Now, my friend in Georgia needs the help of top supporters like you. We hope we can count on you once more. name: Chris Ekstrom
subject: We are the anti-Lincoln Project!
body:
Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gTWPu.7AsrcqI4c&b=zXBzKPn2K_X90kSAgcRRbg

Hi Peter,

My name is Christopher Ekstrom. I am the conservative businessman and donor who will not accept the Socialists in charge of the U.S. Senate! -I want you to help me fight the liberals- including the nasty Vichy "Republicans" in the Lincoln Project - and right now, I need you to join me in that fight

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gTWPu.7AsrcqI4c&b=zXBzKPn2K_X90kSAgcRRbg
!

Disgusting grifter consultants like Steve Schmidt, George Conway, and other backstabbing, traitor "Republicans" fought Donald Trump all the way- because they couldn't make any money off him!

So instead they raised $78 million off of gullible liberal billionaires - spending less than $25 million of that on actual ads and programs.

So basically, these people are the exact kind of slimy, swampy grifters that President Trump came to boot!

Now, they are playing footsie with Marxist AOC to advance their bank accounts:

Steve Schmidt, co-founder of the Lincoln Project, shared a lengthy Twitter thread early Saturday publicly reaching out to Democratic New York Congresswoman Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez.

Schmidt called for a civil discussion of ideas and respect for each other's points of view.

"We say the following with respect and seriousness Ma'am. Our hand is open and we need to work together or we are going to lose America. The fight will last for many years," he wrote.

Schmidt also said that if the two worked together they could defeat autocracy, despite their differences. He ended the thread by listing Ocasio-Cortez's qualities that the Lincoln Project admires, including her conviction and integrity.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gTWPu.7AsrcqI4c&b=zXBzKPn2K_X90kSAgcRRbg

But that's not all. They are also trying to defeat our courageous Republican Senators Purdue and Loeffler in Georgia!

While most of the billionaire donors were longtime Democratic donors, the group also received money from some right-leaning billionaires. For example, Jennifer Pritzker donated more than $250,000 to committees supporting Trump in 2016, and Robert Ziff gave $250,000 to a super-PAC trying to Republicans running for Congress elected in 2018.

While the Lincoln Project devoted the majority of its advertising dollars to the presidential race, the group also spent millions trying (unsuccessfully) to help Democratic Senate candidates in Montana, South Carolina, Maine and Alaska. There’s still two more races, both for Georgia Senate seats, which will determine control of the U.S. Senate. The Lincoln Project, founded by a group of anti-Trump Republicans, is putting its money behind Democratic candidates Jon Ossoff and Raphael Warnock.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gTWPu.7AsrcqI4c&b=zXBzKPn2K_X90kSAgcRRbg

When I think about the Lincoln Project, I think about the Vichy French during World War II.

They surrendered to Hitler, then helping Hitler carry out his dastardly crimes. After the War, they were persecuted and cast aside in disgrace.

THAT is what the Lincoln Project people deserve!

They share the agenda of AOC:

-Defunding the police.

-Making working people pay for the rich to take "gender studies" college classes!

-"Repenting for whiteness" (Warnock's words, not mine).

-AOC's Green New Deal.

IF THIS ISN'T WHAT YOU WANT, WE NEED TO BEAT THE LINCOLN PROJECT TOADIES IN GEORGIA!!!

These Vichy Republicans have been cast down in disgrace. Let's beat them!.

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gTWPu.7AsrcqI4c&b=zXBzKPn2K_X90kSAgcRRbg

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gTWPu.7AsrcqI4c&b=zXBzKPn2K_X90kSAgcRRbg

Drain the DC Swamp PAC is the anti-Lincoln Project. We don't surrender to Marxists, we don't coddle them, we don't work with them- we defeat them, and we do it often!

We are America First patriots who are taking the fight to the Socialists and their Vichy Republican allies. Help us make sure the Good Guys have control of the Senate!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gTWPu.7AsrcqI4c&b=zXBzKPn2K_X90kSAgcRRbg

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gTWPu.7AsrcqI4c&b=zXBzKPn2K_X90kSAgcRRbg

Time is running out. January is almost upon us! We can make a difference here - but only with your help!

We want pro-gun, pro-life, pro-Trump Senators to win, but we MUST win two of two races there. Will you help us?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gTWPu.7AsrcqI4c&b=zXBzKPn2K_X90kSAgcRRbg

Your contribution is so crucial. Your $25, 50, 100, 250, 500, 1000 or more will send an immediate message to the Left

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gTWPu.7AsrcqI4c&b=zXBzKPn2K_X90kSAgcRRbg
- Georgia is not Socialist, and we don't need the Vichy Republicans either!

The President is fighting. Our two Republican Senators are fighting. They need us! Help us push forward and win in Georgia

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gTWPu.7AsrcqI4c&b=zXBzKPn2K_X90kSAgcRRbg
, for America!

I am excited to get to work with Ashley Hinson in this upcoming Congress to clean up the mess that Pelosi and the radical Democrat party has left in their wake. == **== Thanks to Nancy Pelosi's so-called "leadership," Congress just had its LEAST productive year in decades. Ashley is ready to roll up her sleeves and fight with us to help hard working Americans all over the country. == == == == == == == Ashley ran to END the chaos and dysfunction that the radical left has caused in Congress. name: Tom Fitton
subject: Fighting For the Rule of Law
body:
Open this email to see how you can help Judicial Watch!

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Judicial Watch has won significant battles here in Washington _against_ political corruption and _for_ the rule of law which is why I ask you to **_[join our fight by making a tax deductible donation](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52301&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEyMTcxNjU2MTg=)_** today.
In 2016 President Trump called for "draining the swamp" in Washington, DC...something we've been doing for 26 years, and we stood with him...
On illegal immigration, we supported the President's efforts to respect federal immigration laws and protect Americans against imported drugs, crime and terrorism and relieve us of the enormous taxpayer-funded costs associated with providing public services for millions of illegal aliens... _but there is so much more to do_.
Like you, I am especially fearful and angry when corrupt state politicians and arrogant liberal mayors, boards of supervisors and/or sheriffs maintain _unlawful and deadly illegal alien sanctuary policies_ ...
...or when Deep State operatives deep within our permanent federal government agencies unlawfully targeted President Trump and his administration officials who challenged corruption and unlawful government secrecy... and when corrupt politicians like Joe Biden, Barack Obama, Hillary Clinton and former FBI and DOJ top officials think they can get away with criminal activity.
You are already helping us pursue justice on these critical battlefronts. And it continues to be no easy task.
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52301&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEyMTcxNjU2MTg=)
---

That's why I'm especially proud that Judicial Watch is having more impact fighting corruption and government secrecy now than in any other period since opening our doors in 1994. _And 2020 has already proved to be even more pivotal_ :
* We filed no fewer than 7 lawsuits against U.S. government agencies to get to the truth about the corrupt Hunter Biden-Burisma Holdings company relationship and then-Vice President Joe Biden's use of American aid dollars to put an end to the investigation of Burisma Holdings in Ukraine... _and we 're now putting the same level of focus on the Hunter/Joe Biden shenanigans in China_!

* Court-ordered releases of emails, other documents and sworn testimony to Judicial Watch continue to shed light on Hillary Clinton's corrupt State Department. _We literally altered the course of history_ in 2016 with our _first_ massive investigation into her email and pay-to-play scandals, and we _continue_ to force releases of documents the American people have a right to see!

* _Having filed more than 65 separate lawsuits_ against government agencies and departments we continue to "turn over every rock" uncovering the Deep State conspiracy to torpedo the Trump presidency that reached from the highest levels of the former Obama administration to deep within our "permanent government" and liberal mainstream media. _The truth about this attempted coup must be_ exposed (because election results have no impact on our commitment to holding corrupt public officials accountable).

* Our history-making work protecting the honesty of our elections is now helping disrupt the Left's plans. To help prevent voter fraud, we continue to successfully sue states who fail to clean their voter rolls of dead, moved and other ineligible voters. In 2019 we reached an historic legal settlement with California and Los Angeles County to remove up to 1.59 million registered names from the county's voter rolls, a _nd we are now suing Colorado, North Carolina and Pennsylvania over their failure to clean their voter rolls_.

* Our immigration law enforcement work continues to lead the nation's wars against illegal immigration as we fight in the courts to overturn sanctuary policies. This is essential work, since hundreds of liberal jurisdictions ignored Trump administration efforts to shut down sanctuary policies. Judicial Watch is scheduled to go to trial in April of 2021 in a challenge of San Francisco's infamous and deadly sanctuary policy. We also filed a lawsuit against a similar sanctuary policy in Santa Clara County, California. _The outcome of these lawsuits will have a potentially historic impact on the illegal immigration debate_.

Overall, no one is working harder than your Judicial Watch to drain the swamp in Washington, fight illegal immigration and illegal sanctuary policies, and hold powerful politicians accountable to the American people under the law.

**_And that why I ask you to join our fight by making your best_**[**tax-deductible contribution to Judicial Watch now**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52301&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEyMTcxNjU2MTg=)** _._**

Our nation needs us even more, and [**I am counting on you to join our fight**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52301&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEyMTcxNjU2MTg=). Our work has never been more important - _or urgent_! Thank you for whatever you can [**donate**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52301&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEyMTcxNjU2MTg=).

Sincerely,

Tom Fitton

President, Judicial Watch

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52301&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEyMTcxNjU2MTg=)

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Who is Raphael Warnock?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Friend, while both Democratic candidates in Georgia make me fearful for our country if they're elected, Rahael Warnock's past raises some serious, and frankly frightening concerns.
Raphael Warnock was a member of a church that **HOSTED** and **PRAISED** Fidel Castro and his communist ideals.
Warnock's association with communism does not boil down to just that incident, Friend, he's been quoted preaching socialist ideals on numerous occasions.
As a Cuban-American, the threat of socialism invading and destroying our country is not a hypothetical -- it's real. But Friend, the possibility of an American Senator with documented ties to communism should have each and every American on high alert. **How many communist sympathizers embedded in our Government are too many for you? For me, ANY amount is far too many.**
If we don't stop them now, we could see our nation infected by the communist cancer that has destroyed every nation it's infected in history. [**Friend, will you stand with Kelly Loeffler RIGHT NOW and help her fight back against socialism taking root in Georgia?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tvSKAOS20vCCI_HdraxVjPrRzV5Y6T1IoyxzM6tRWLyb790Re8Q40PZbAI1-9ZFON3xY-j6SXGOM-N9ujNbnwr-4ubQwAFnvy_6lZvEct3l1AQ4evqrUzy9xR2koul47KgUSsMqKakb2i6lP8nvkwXmGUNtOPsv6sCbrFb5XqtwQgV7pJE4S6cJm5LJizyTaqZ369F5IH2W7jACdYii_Qx7-0t_0NWG9yN4NOOYA3V0M1vwNzk36BEbJxpvC2wEgovs6CjPiO9VQgIRdU0yzytfwNgRFm8ItgFn0sx7DPpCCvBIkQpmFP9lSy0euj3lWL9Z3rBR0Y6KpXoRooGlN-dMSJZkjG0jCQ382VU1nzmJbC9W-unUzE5tuNxWjNygmpl_7G7LI6iIBtmLcCBt5P4bCK7CI5wZalDw3CTWir_S9i-QpgLoTyy8HtHTuenhq&c=qT0oSgFMlH3gZHRiYlq58AYAb4B5y7z9K1g2tWqWwHRV1NumhG1-lw==&ch=GddDGX-dEjDZ5oYUpKYtYxrBXuryzeRPpwLvVlrBP-ixvoqSbMQJGA==)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ilhan=20Omar?=
subject: Let’s add to our growing Squad
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/be11de84237e/stephen-miller-must-go-3881070?e=c86b962a62)
---
| |
---
| | Peter, When I launched my campaign to be the first Somali American to serve in Congress in 2018, I saw firsthand the enormous barriers that keep working people from running for office. Thanks to organizations like Justice Democrats, our progressive movement is getting bigger and stronger each day. Justice Democrats give people like me and AOC a fighting chance to run bold, progressive campaigns that take on the status quo and the resources to power us to victory. **Here’s the truth:** We need to elect more progressive fighters in order to build on our movement and deliver meaningful change such as Medicare for All, canceling student loan debt, and passing a Green New Deal. Justice Democrats needs our help to recruit, train, and organize our communities so that we can elect the next generation of diverse working-class leaders who are committed to racial, social, and economic justice. **But they cannot do it alone.** We’re already planning ahead for the next election cycle, and Justice Democrats will need the resources to run a slate of progressive candidates and add to our growing Squad — like Cori Bush and Jamaal Bowman. [Will you make a donation of $5 or whatever you can afford right now to Justice Democrats to help build our progressive movement?](https://justicedemocrats.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1808308b1db892bd20345fc2c&id=ce1b6a1506&e=c86b962a62) **[Contribute](https://justicedemocrats.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1808308b1db892bd20345fc2c&id=bb07eea7c6&e=c86b962a62)** As my sister Ayanna always says, the people closest to the pain should be closest to the power. And we are on our way to building a more just, equitable future that represents the voices of those left behind. In solidarity, Ilhan Omar

| Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://justicedemocrats.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1808308b1db892bd20345fc2c&id=f87aa688f9&e=c86b962a62) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://justicedemocrats.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1808308b1db892bd20345fc2c&id=974f547717&e=c86b962a62) and your state public health department.
---
| |
---

Federal candidates or officeholders mentioned above are not asking for more than $5,000 per calendar year from individuals or other federally permissible sources, nor are they asking for any funds from corporations, labor unions, or any other federally prohibited sources.
**Our mailing address is:**
Justice DemocratsPO Box 910Knoxville, TN 37901-0910
[Add us to your address book](https://justicedemocrats.us5.list-manage.com/vcard?u=1808308b1db892bd20345fc2c&id=9c15511cb4)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://justicedemocrats.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=1808308b1db892bd20345fc2c&id=9c15511cb4&e=c86b962a62) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://justicedemocrats.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=1808308b1db892bd20345fc2c&id=9c15511cb4&e=c86b962a62&c=0a0e44a767).

body: Judicial Watch Director of Investigations & Research Chris Farrell will appear on “Weekly Briefing with Christina Bobb” on One America News Network in the 2 pm hour ET, Saturday, December 19th & Sunday, December 20th, to discuss Attorney General Barr's resignation; the investigation into Hunter Biden's questionable income practices; Georgia Senate races; and more! name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Your vaccine questions answered
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
This has been an exciting week as the first doses of the COVID-19 vaccine were distributed in Rhode Island. We have had a lot of people reach out to us with questions about the vaccine. Today, Dr. Philip Chan and Tricia Washburn of the Rhode Island Department of Health (RIDOH) hosted a Facebook Live to answer questions that Rhode Islanders have sent us about the vaccine. You can watch that video by clicking below.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sSr4YCXog96pt3j5AFUob0bleGliviPpgScECBZ9DGXqgmRo0zrIl1YY0YeFoo_5CjkhXVkQQWYt8lC37L5G4_TTYbSgkmQez8MjR2BWzTOaALRSM8dqE8Fgc8_bKXPTmwk6gZrte9a3FLqWu3NakpW2cIKVmS2rPvSLtd1Cip73R8s_TJ_Gd8XHm7_pve0CQpAjKTJbsI0=&c=epnBA9gZ50cGuPbXYASY16iRYTxmDlkxjahHwmYcO8ViyldfzV-_Sw==&ch=X6IK_3ku9xGZl6ecTAdQS3kI-5I8vhgj9HLmCmcbA_qNBSuGnrMbCQ==)
---
| Tricia and Dr. Chan covered a wide range of topics, from minor vaccine side effects, to distribution plans and timelines, to some of the transportation and storage challenges they're tackling. I encourage you to take a few minutes to watch the video, and I hope it helps you feel hopeful about all the work that has been done to put COVID-19 in the rear-view mirror.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sSr4YCXog96pt3j5AFUob0bleGliviPpgScECBZ9DGXqgmRo0zrIl1YY0YeFoo_5Hmq6Ocb2-kcPFqydbbp-AhTnomvbZWtY7udLnv7PK-UkxLl5fL7M1uhzb5YUWtzOC17rkHC56uX8quBZH0_JiUfvsAUb6hIsznJHOOKeFF3_Shsrh5VnA6TsStBhvepIpEl0tP_q9nLTCS6zCI7aCw80HRL3bVOLJZBoXOzW68D1DsuWCUVyn-EXyXUDVsDu6X7q8T1UkACJDpRZw-1qKsxhfaqn-R17TwLePRO4-hbC0pFQK58tyPR_cOwPf0UE_6lIHjqYbjM=&c=epnBA9gZ50cGuPbXYASY16iRYTxmDlkxjahHwmYcO8ViyldfzV-_Sw==&ch=X6IK_3ku9xGZl6ecTAdQS3kI-5I8vhgj9HLmCmcbA_qNBSuGnrMbCQ==).

name: Team Fair Fight
subject: Tomorrow is Georgia Vote Early Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa32f/34a064cc/1ae23ba4/7020f46/3043446592/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Friend - **Tomorrow, Georgians across the state will be heading to the polls for "Georgia Vote Early Day"**. Over one million Georgians have ALREADY VOTED in the January 5 runoff for U.S. Senate and Public Service Commissioner, but we still have work to do to ensure every eligible Georgia voter is able to make their voice heard! **Want to participate in Georgia Vote Early Day?** Make your voting plan NOW and head to one of your county's early voting locations tomorrow! Visit [iwillvote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa32f/34a064cc/1ae23ba4/7020f47/3043446592/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://www.iwillvote.com") or call the Voter Protection Hotline at 888-730-5816 to find out when and where you can vote early in person. Don't forget to take [an acceptable form of identification](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa32f/34a064cc/1ae23ba4/7020f44/3043446592/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://sos.ga.gov/index.php/elections/georgia_voter_identification_requirements2") with you when you cast your ballot. **Plan to vote by mail?**
* If you have not requested your mail ballot-- don't wait! Go to [ballotrequest.sos.ga.gov](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa32f/34a064cc/1ae23ba4/7020f45/3043446592/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://ballotrequest.sos.ga.gov/") and request your mail ballot TODAY!
* Already requested your ballot? Great! Confirm your ballot was mailed out to you and sign up to receive updates at [georgia.ballottrax.net/voter](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa32f/34a064cc/1ae23ba4/7020f42/3043446592/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://georgia.ballottrax.net/voter/").
* Received your mail ballot? Follow the instructions and complete it now; don't forget to sign the oath on the outside of the envelope!
* Ready to return your ballot? Perfect. Return your ballot immediately to a drop box in your county, to your county elections office, or by mail! Go to [iwillvote.com/locate](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa32f/34a064cc/1ae23ba4/7020f43/3043446592/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://iwillvote.com/locate") if you need help determining where to return your ballot.
* After you've returned your ballot, check [georgia.ballottrax.net/voter](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa32f/34a064cc/1ae23ba4/7020f42/3043446592/VEsB/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://georgia.ballottrax.net/voter/") to make sure it's received; once it's reported as "ACCEPTED", that means YOU DID IT! Your ballot was received!

Tomorrow, on Georgia Early Vote Day, join your fellow Georgians at the ballot box-- or the drop box! Grab an eligible friend or family member, make your voting plans, and show up and show out for the candidates that will fight for Georgians! If you have any questions or need help please call the Voter Protection Hotline at 888-730-5816 or check out [peachvote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa32f/34a064cc/1ae23ba4/7020f40/3043446592/VEsO/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.peachvote.com/") for more information. \- Team Fair Fight |
---|---|---
